# Figma Workspace & Asset Setup

**Context**

Establish a Figma workspace (or equivalent) with the initial pages, components, and tokens that mirror the design system. Export starter assets and icon set.

## Goals

- Create a shared Figma file with tokens, base components, and wireframe templates.
- Export a minimal icon set and provide SVGs in `public/icons/`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Figma workspace created (link in issue) with token page and component library.
- Exported icons and starter images placed in `public/icons/` and referenced in README.

## Tasks

- [ ] Create Figma file and invite design/dev collaborators.
- [ ] Add token page (colors, typography, spacing).
- [ ] Build base components (Button, Card, Badge) and simple layouts.
- [ ] Export icons and add to repo `public/icons/`.

## Estimate

Owner role: UI/UX Designer
Estimate: 8 hours
